siteMetadata.name: Changi Im
siteMetadata.title: Hi, I'm Changi
siteMetadata.description: Studying Vision & Image Across the World
siteMetadata.about:
Welcome to the Changi website! 
    Currently, I work as an engineer at Samsung Electronics, System LSI in South Korea. My research interests are focused on practical image processing that can address various problems worldwide.
    I enjoy sharing ideas with others, particularly through brainstorming sessions. It's truly enjoyable to exchange random thoughts and develop them into innovative ideas.
    Thank you for visiting my website again. Below, you'll find more information about me!

publications.name: Multi-Task Learning Approach Using Dynamic Hyperparameter for Multi-Exposure Fusion

publications.name: Real-time Wild Animal Detection and Tracking Method for Incident on the Road

projects.name: Development of Spatial Characteristics Extraction Algorithm in Air Conditioning Space for Cooperative Control of Air Conditioning
projects.description: - Developing a relative positioning algorithm for installed air conditioners using image information and extracting spatial feature through product location and room temperature change

projects.name: Real-time Object Detection based on Yolo v7 for Traffic Safety System
projects.description: - Improving the speed and accuracy performance of detector learning networks by solving data imbalance and classification problems

projects.name: Smart Pet Robot
projects.description: - By developing a pet robot that provides psychological stability and smart home care functions, it helps depressed patients, the elderly living alone, the disabled, and people with cognitive difficulties

skills.name: Others
skills.description: Raspberry Pi, ARM embedded microcontroller, Oscilloscope
